latest.summary: fix(csv): harden CSV analysis semantics, delimiter detection, date parsing, and pipeline metadata propagation | fix(json): harden JSON, NDJSON, Socrata-style JSON, gzip loading, and mixed identifier preservation

recent.summary: feat(backup): add local backup verification and dry-run restore workflows | fix(backup): harden restore safety checks, incremental base selection, temp-root registry handling, and cryptography dependency coverage

feat(search): add clear-search for safe deletion from fts_index.db by path, tag, or the full search index | feat(search): add dry-run previews, confirmation prompts, --yes automation, operation IDs, and per-table deletion summaries
fix(search): prevent duplicated locale prefix in Pagefind links | fix(csv): persist cleaned and raw data through a single write path

fix(workflow): update publish pipeline to create a PR for Homebrew formula updates instead of pushing directly to main | fix(workflow): add pull-requests write permission for the publish workflow token
feat(release): enforce release retention and archive old release pages | feat(ux): improve show-help UX and documentation entry experience

archive.summary: feat(backup): add local backup verification and dry-run restore workflows | fix(backup): harden restore safety checks, incremental base selection, temp-root registry handling, and cryptography dependency coverage

feat(search): add clear-search for safe deletion from fts_index.db by path, tag, or the full search index | feat(search): add dry-run previews, confirmation prompts, --yes automation, operation IDs, and per-table deletion summaries
fix(search): prevent duplicated locale prefix in Pagefind links | fix(csv): persist cleaned and raw data through a single write path

fix(workflow): update publish pipeline to create a PR for Homebrew formula updates instead of pushing directly to main | fix(workflow): add pull-requests write permission for the publish workflow token
feat(release): enforce release retention and archive old release pages | feat(ux): improve show-help UX and documentation entry experience
